episodes.title: US News LIVE: Dems Direct Threat to Cover-Up After Epstein Victims Hearing | Pam Bondi | Trump | DOJ
episodes.description:
House Oversight Democrats in West Palm Beach, Florida, centered on the release of the Epstein files, the pursuit of justice for survivors, and demands for government accountability. Ranking Member Robert Garcia and other committee members emphasized that the crimes committed by Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell could have been prevented had authorities and prosecutors listened to survivors' and law enforcement's recommendations earlier. 

The committee is demanding that former Attorney General Pam Bondi testify publicly under oath regarding the handling and release of the Epstein files, criticizing her attempts to provide testimony behind closed doors

#live #epsteinfiles #epsteinsurvivors #democrats #uscongress #housedemocrats
